}

<role_action>
{
  "action": "call_role",
  "role": "data_agent",
  "assignment": {
    "objective": "prepare_data_artifacts",
    "task_summary": "Retrieve TEC time series for the specified regions and date range to enable subsequent statistical comparison.",
    "scope": {
      "dataset_ref": "default",
      "regions": ["equatorial_atlantic", "midlat_europe", "highlat_north"],
      "start": "2024-03-01",
      "end": "2024-04-01",
      "task_intent": "compare_regions"
    },
    "deliverables_to_produce": ["series_id"],
    "expected_output_type": "data_artifacts",
    "completion_criteria": "Return role_response when series handles for all three regions are available, or cannot_complete if blocked.",
    "constraints": ["Use only the role contract.", "Do not call other agents."]
  },
  "reason": "No series artifacts exist; data_agent must retrieve the time series for the requested regions and date range before math_agent can compute statistics or comparisons."
}
</role_action>

raw_model_outputs:
<role_action>
{
  "action": "call_role",
  "role": "data_agent",
  "assignment": {
    "objective": "prepare_data_artifacts",
    "task_summary": "Retrieve TEC time series for midlat_europe to enable subsequent statistical and interval analysis.",
    "scope": {
      "dataset_ref": "default",
      "regions": ["midlat_europe"],
      "start": "2024-03-01",
      "end": "2024-04-01",
      "task_intent": "user_intent"
    },
    "deliverables_to_produce": ["series_id"],
    "expected_output_type": "data_artifacts",
    "completion_criteria": "Return role_response when data artifact handles for the assignment scope are available, or cannot_complete if blocked.",
    "constraints": ["Use only the role contract.", "Do not call other agents."]
  },
  "reason": "No series_id artifacts exist; data_agent must retrieve the time series before math_agent can compute statistics, thresholds, or detect intervals."
}
</role_action>

<role_action>
{
  "action": "call_role",
  "role": "math_agent",
  "assignment": {
    "objective": "compute_statistics_and_detect_intervals",
    "task_summary": "Compute basic statistics, thresholds, high TEC intervals, and stable intervals for midlat_europe.",
    "scope": {
      "dataset_ref": "default",
      "regions": ["midlat_europe"],
      "start": "2024-03-01",
      "end": "2024-04-01",
      "task_intent": "report_generation"
    },
    "deliverables_to_produce": ["stats_id", "threshold_id", "high_intervals", "stable_intervals"],
    "expected_output_type": "computed_artifacts",
    "completion_criteria": "Return role_response when all required statistical, threshold, interval, and comparison artifacts are available, or cannot_complete if blocked.",
    "constraints": ["Use only the role contract.", "Do not call other agents.", "Do not invent numerical values."]
  },
  "reason": "Data series is available; need to compute statistics, thresholds, and detect high/stable intervals before generating the report."
}
</role_action>
